params.name: Royal Celtic Harp
params.description:
On Dec 14, 1071 AD, the Royal Celtic Harp appeared in Ireland for the first time. Royal Celtic Harp is a large polyphonic stringed instrument. It can be played solo or as a part of an ensemble. According to legend, King David once ordered a harp made out of pure gold. When played solo, it exhibits a soft lyrical cadenza.
[Classic Works]
Concerto for Flute and Harp by Mozart. Harp Concerto by Greer and Hindemith. Waltz of Flowers by Tchaikovsky.
